{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Snail Shell was owned by the Knight Of Light, whose existance was more formidable that the devil. It once tortured a Snail and turned it into a demon by channeling its hate, then purifying it with light to transform it into a loyal servant.
|affct=FTH
|hard=DEF
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=4409
|relic1=Golden Fleece
|relic2=Viking Horn
|relic3=Epic of Gilgamesh
|relic4=Cornucopia
|relic5=Templar Emblem
}}
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=3
|fire=4
|wind=4
|form=Angel
|element=Fire
|realm=Britland
|orangehard=DEF
}}
